description: Tracks which source files each HTML doc page covers, plus a SHA-256 fingerprint of each source at the time the docs were last refreshed. Run `node docs/check-docs.mjs` to detect drift, then `--update` to refresh hashes after editing the affected pages.

docs.docs/architecture.html: Big picture, request lifecycle, ctx shape, module map.
docs.docs/configs.html: Profile JSON schema reference + cheat sheet for plugin sub-blocks.
docs.docs/plugins.html: Plugin pipeline + reference for every built-in plugin.
docs.docs/storage.html: fs / sqlite backends + recording shape + body encoding.
docs.docs/tui.html: TUI tabs, keybindings, layout, headless mode.
docs.docs/extending.html: How to write a custom plugin (skeleton, hooks, ctx, gotchas).

src/index.js.summary: Entry point. Parses argv (--headless, --config), wires logger to stdout in headless mode, otherwise creates the TUI.

src/tui.js.summary: Blessed-based UI. Tabs: Configs / Logs / Mocks / Plugins / Help. Global keys for tab nav, start/stop, quit, reload.

src/proxy.js.summary: startProxy(): builds storage, loads plugins, runs HTTP server with onRequest/onResponse pipeline, manual forwarder with redirect support, WS upgrade passthrough via http-proxy.

src/plugins.js.summary: loadPlugins() (auto-discovers plugins/*.js, instantiates from object or factory, sorts by config.plugins order, calls init); runOnRequest stops at first short-circuit; runOnResponse always runs all.

src/storage.js.summary: FsStorage (one JSON per recording, scans dir on findBest), SqliteStorage (single table, indexed lookup, optional better-sqlite3 dep), buildRecord helper, encodeBody/decodeBody (utf8 vs base64).

src/match.js.summary: compileRule() picks substring/regex/exact/any kind. matchRule() applies it. splitPathQuery() splits at first '?'.

src/logger.js.summary: EventEmitter-based Logger. Methods: info/warn/error/debug emit 'log'; trace(kind,data) emits 'trace'.

plugins/cors.js.summary: Adds CORS headers in onResponse, short-circuits OPTIONS preflight in onRequest with 204. Supports origin string/array/'*', credentials, exposeHeaders, maxAge.

plugins/latency.js.summary: onRequest: sleeps delayMs+random*jitterMs, then with failRate probability sets a synthetic failStatus response. Per-rule overrides via compileRule/matchRule.

plugins/bucket.js.summary: In-memory CRUD store keyed by collection path. idPattern: uuid/numeric/alphanumeric/regex:<pat>. POST/GET/PATCH/PUT/DELETE on /coll[/:id]. Optional persistPath for JSON file persistence; numeric counter rebuilt from data on startup. Misses fall through.

plugins/mock.js.summary: First matching rule decides. Actions: PASS (no-op), MOCK (inline response, JSON-encodes objects), RET_REC (storage.findBest; fallback PASS/empty200/500).

plugins/recorder.js.summary: onResponse only. By default skips non-'proxy' sources; recordAll:true also captures mock/bucket/etc. Calls buildRecord then storage.save.

configs/httpbin.json.summary: Example: mock + recorder against httpbin.org with fs storage.

configs/example-bucket.json.summary: Example: bucket with three collections (numeric, uuid+template, regex) + mock + recorder.

configs/example-sqlite.json.summary: Example: same as httpbin.json but with sqlite storage.

package.json.summary: Scripts (start, start:headless), deps (blessed), optional dep (better-sqlite3), Node >=18.

README.md.summary: Top-level README mirroring most of the docs at a higher level. If this changes, the Overview page may need a touch-up.

src/ws-proxy.js.summary: Handles WebSocket upstream handshakes, parses/re-encodes frames, and bridges text/binary messages into runOnWsMessage().

plugins/tap.js.summary: onResponse observer that emits tap trace events with method, status, latency, response size, source, headers, and copy-as-cURL command.

plugins/tap.tui.js.summary: Plugin TUI tab for live request/response inspection with URL/status filters, pause/resume, clear, details, and copy-as-cURL via OSC 52.

plugins/post.js.summary: No-op runtime plugin named post; enabling it activates the companion POST TUI request-client tab.

plugins/post.tui.js.summary: Plugin TUI tab for sending ad-hoc HTTP requests either directly to the selected target or through localhost:<port> to exercise the plugin pipeline.

plugins/ws-tap.js.summary: Built-in WebSocket tap plugin. Logs frames, records sessions to JSON, and supports PASS/DROP/MOCK/REPLAY rules.
